title: ‘Taken offsite’: Who was the shooter at Trump’s White House dinner? First image emerges
summary_full: President Donald Trump was evacuated from the White House Correspondents' Dinner after shots were fired, with the suspect apprehended by the Secret Service. An individual reportedly attempted to enter with a gun but was stopped before reaching the ballroom. Trump praised law enforcement and urged the event to continue.
